## Summary

-

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Product/content
- [ ] SEO/metadata/redirects
- [ ] UI/design
- [ ] API/admin
- [ ] Deployment/config
- [ ] Docs/repo hygiene

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm audit:prod`
- [ ] Cloudflare dry-run, if deployment behavior changed

## SEO / Routing Impact

- [ ] No route/indexation impact
- [ ] Metadata changed
- [ ] Redirects changed
- [ ] Sitemap/indexation behavior changed
- [ ] Spanish/English parity changed

Notes:

## Screenshots Or Smoke Notes

Add screenshots, local preview notes, or live smoke results when the change affects UI, content, forms, routes, or deployment.
